mapper.sql: work_unit_idx AS idx, work_unit_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx, ttl, dscr, ctgr, sts, use_yn, use_cnt, last_used_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at
wrk_unit_git_cfg_idx AS idx, wrk_unit_git_cfg_uuid AS uuid, work_unit_idx, mbr_acct_idx, prvd_cd, repo_url, auth_nm, acs_tokn_enc, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_work_unit WHERE work_unit_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM tb_work_unit WHERE work_unit_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM tb_work_unit WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
AND use_yn = 'Y'
ORDER BY use_yn DESC, COALESCE(last_used_at, updated_at) DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_work_unit WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL AND work_unit_uuid IN
CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_work_unit ( mbr_acct_idx, ttl, dscr, ctgr, sts, use_yn, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{ttl}, #{dscr}, #{ctgr}, #{sts}, #{useYn}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_unit_git_cfg WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL AND work_unit_idx IN
#{workUnitIdx}
ORDER BY work_unit_idx ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wrk_unit_git_cfg ( work_unit_idx, mbr_acct_idx, prvd_cd, repo_url, auth_nm, acs_tokn_enc, created_by ) VALUES ( #{workUnitIdx}, #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{prvdCd}, #{repoUrl}, #{authNm}, #{acsToknEnc}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_work_unit SET ttl = #{ttl}, dscr = #{dscr}, ctgr = #{ctgr}, sts = #{sts}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE work_unit_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

UPDATE tb_wrk_unit_git_cfg SET prvd_cd = #{prvdCd}, repo_url = #{repoUrl}, auth_nm = #{authNm}, acs_tokn_enc = #{acsToknEnc}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_unit_git_cfg_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

UPDATE tb_wrk_unit_git_cfg SET updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now(), del_at = now() WHERE wrk_unit_git_cfg_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_work_unit SET use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE work_unit_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

UPDATE tb_work_unit wu SET use_cnt = ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM tb_wrk_dly_rpt_wrk_unit drwu INNER JOIN tb_wrk_dly_rpt dr ON dr.wrk_dly_rpt_idx = drwu.wrk_dly_rpt_idx WHERE drwu.work_unit_idx = wu.work_unit_idx AND drwu.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND dr.del_at IS NULL ), last_used_at = ( SELECT MAX(dr.updated_at) FROM tb_wrk_dly_rpt_wrk_unit drwu INNER JOIN tb_wrk_dly_rpt dr ON dr.wrk_dly_rpt_idx = drwu.wrk_dly_rpt_idx WHERE drwu.work_unit_idx = wu.work_unit_idx AND drwu.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND dr.del_at IS NULL ) WHERE wu.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND wu.del_at IS NULL AND wu.work_unit_idx IN
#{workUnitIdx}
